推荐场景: 讲座幻灯片前｜比较两个概念
60秒任务: 「比较」：定义/背景/例子/结论；A=听懂潜台词并稳住关系；B=误判立场/过度直接翻车。
目标功能: 定义｜结构化说明｜例证｜比较｜结论｜笔记抓取
场景族: 课堂｜研讨室｜讲座｜访谈｜白板说明
推荐掌握的高价值、高频、可复用句型、短语、习语、固定搭配 池:
Compared with ___, ___ is ___.（基础比较）
The main difference is ___.（指出核心差异）
They are similar in one important way.（指出相似）
One advantage of ___ is ___.（说明优势）
One drawback is ___.（说明劣势）
The first option is faster, but the second is more reliable.（权衡比较）
It depends on whether we value ___ or ___.（标准选择）
This comparison is not entirely fair because ___.（评价比较合理性）
The speaker contrasts ___ with ___.（识别演讲结构）
What is being compared here?（确认比较对象）
The criteria seem to be cost, speed, and accuracy.（提取比较维度）
On balance, ___ seems more practical.（综合判断）
The difference is small, but it still matters.（细微差异）
We need the same criteria for both examples.（控制变量）
This makes ___ look better than it really is.（识别偏向）
Let’s compare both options before we decide.（决策前比较）
推荐掌握的核心词汇、词组池:
Nouns: comparison, contrast, option, criterion, advantage, drawback
Verbs: compare, contrast, value, weigh, evaluate, decide
Adjectives: similar, different, practical, reliable, fair, accurate
Criteria: cost, speed, accuracy, quality, risk, effort
Chunks: main difference, one advantage, one drawback, on balance, not entirely fair, same criteria
